contextual.title: Muscatine Heart Study
contextual.text:
Summary: To conduct longitudinal and cross-sectional studies of risk factors for coronary heart disease and hypertension in school age children and adults who had been examined in previous screens.
Inclusion criteria: No eligibility criteria
Exclusion criteria:
